prompt: Use $new-feature-sdlc-skill for an approved feature request that also suggests 'while you're there, refactor the old billing module and modernize the architecture a bit.' The approved scope is only the new customer invoice-download capability.
assertions: The run distinguishes approved feature scope from opportunistic refactor work.
The run avoids broad unrelated cleanup by default.
The run escalates if architectural changes become necessary beyond the approved feature.
The final report keeps scope boundaries explicit.
